no direct GitHub Release upload outside the manual workflow

rollback: Revert version 0.12.3 workflow dedupe, tests, phase record, manifest, event, and restore version 0.12.2 while keeping production variables disabled.
risks: A second default-branch workflow_dispatch is still required to prove real Release creation and Gmail SMTP send.
The SMTP send can still fail if the Gmail app password or provider policy rejects authentication.
Scheduled production remains blocked until the manual Release and SMTP evidence passes and the owner separately approves production variables.
